route53resolver.resolverqueryloggingconf: The AWS::Route53Resolver::ResolverQueryLoggingConfig resource is a complex type that contains settings for one query logging configuration.

route53resolver.resolverqueryloggingconf.Description: The ARN of the resource that you want Resolver to send query logs: an Amazon S3 bucket, a CloudWatch Logs log group, or a Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.
The name of the query logging configuration.
